hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider data to create a unified onboarding workflow that supports sanctions screening, risk-based review and audit-ready decision trails for directors and shareholders.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Director and shareholder reviews remain disconnected
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with fragmented data across identity, corporate records and sanctions screening for directors and shareholders. This creates slow onboarding, inconsistent risk assessments and incomplete audit trails that are hard to trace or defend in review processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity, corporate registry, sanctions and PEP screening results into a unified KYB workflow that delivers consistent risk assessments and maintains a full audit trail for director and shareholder reviews.
workflow_title: From director checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects director and shareholder screening results through risk-based review, case creation, compliance decisions and audit evidence for structured onboarding workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows that preserve audit evidence and support consistent director and shareholder risk review decisions.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment to provide clear, traceable director and shareholder onboarding reviews.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for director and shareholder reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY organizes director and shareholder data, sanctions, PEP and adverse media screenings into structured, risk-based KYB workflows for regulated onboarding and review by compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure KYB onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into connected onboarding workflows, applying internal policies for risk-based routing, decisions, case creation and evidence collection in a controlled compliance environment.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY keeps detailed logs of decisions, case histories and supporting documents to maintain a clear, auditable record of director and shareholder onboarding reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, consolidating their outputs into one operational layer without disrupting existing vendor relationships or processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but sits above them, turning their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, and audit-ready compliance records.
final_title: Structure director and shareholder reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into audit-ready workflows for KYB screening, sanctions, risk assessments and compliance decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
